candidates.why: Appears directly beneath the selected COGS total rows and ties with the balancing line to the total COGS amount, so it looks like a component already embedded within the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level operating expense to add.
Relevant by label, but it has no visible values and does not present as a usable separate operating line to add.

variables.notes: Selected COGS rows are total/parent rows ('Cost of goods sold' and 'Cost of revenues/COGS'). 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' appears to be a sub-component of those totals, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.why: Appears beneath 'Selling expenses' and alongside balancing rows, indicating it is a component within the selected SG&A bucket rather than a separate same-level line to add.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General Expenses
candidates.why: Looks like a more granular component of SG&A amortization underneath the broader SGA D&A structure, so it should not be added separately when the parent SG&A expense rows are already selected.
Explicitly a balancing/component line under SGA, not a separate add-on row.
Appears directly under 'Administrative expenses' and ties to its balancing value, so it is a sub-component already embedded in the selected administrative expense row.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', and 'Other operating expenses'. The visible D&A rows under selling and administrative expenses appear to be nested components already included in those selected parent rows. No separate R&D row is present, and no explicit R&D D&A line appears.
